text:
Market today: Tech is under pressure, with sentiment shaky due to broader market concerns and potential trade tensions. The real driver for your names is how these macro factors impact chip demand and valuations.

Your holdings: SMH (-12.19%) and SOXL (-46.24%) are in the "SELL" zone and showing significant weakness, amplified by leverage. QQQ (-2.6%) and QQQI (-3.79%) are also flagged for attention. CRWD (10.35%) and SPY (1.05%) are holding up, while SPAL (-51.33%) is deeply underwater and highly volatile.

Watch: Keep an eye on the trade tensions between the US and Canada, as tariffs can disrupt supply chains and impact tech components.

Bottom line: Your leveraged tech and chip positions are the main concern; consider reducing risk on the weakest ones.
plays: Trim SMH: The name is flagged SELL and down significantly. Consider reducing exposure here.
Trim SOXL: Leveraged ETF showing large losses. High decay risk and current weakness warrant trimming.
No new buys today - hold and watch
